name: Pineapple Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Round Steak, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt. Cut in Crisco until crumbly. Gradually add cold water, mixing with a fork until the dough holds together.
2. Shape into a ball and chill if desired.
3. Prepare filling: combine steak, potatoes, onion, carrot, rutabaga, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
4. Divide chilled dough into 6 pieces. Roll each piece on a floured board.
5. Add about 1 cup of the filling to each rolled piece. Pat a small amount of butter on top before covering with the remaining dough.
6. Seal edges and slit the top for steam.
7. Place the shaped turnovers on a greased baking sheet. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 12-15 minutes, then reduce temperature to 375°F (190°C) and bake an additional 30-45 minutes until golden brown.
